title: Bundles of Tales: Vanilla+ Datapack
description: Designed for the Bundles of Tales SMP.
body:
# Bundles of Tales: Vanilla+ Datapack
Designed for the Bundles of Tales SMP.  Feel free to use this in your server!
**MAKE SURE TO INSTALL THE RESOURCE PACK AS WELL!!**


## Items:
**Diamond Apples** can be crafted by surrounding an Apple with 8 Diamonds.  When consumed, they restore 6 hunger points and apply Strength II and Speed II for 30 seconds.

2 **Swirled Apples** can be crafted with a Diamond Apple and a Golden Apple.  When consumed, they give the effects of both the Diamond Apple AND the Golden Apple.

**Chicken Sandwiches** can be crafted by placing a Cooked Chicken vertically in between 2 pieces of bread.  When consumed, they apply Saturation for 2 minutes and 30 seconds.

**Bacon and Eggs** can be crafted with a Cooked Porkchop and an Egg.

3 **Sushi** can be crafted by placing a row of Wheat along the bottom of the crafting table, a row of Dried Kelp in the middle, and a row of Raw Salmon on top.  When consumed, they apply Saturation for 2 minutes and 30 seconds.

9 **Cupcakes** can be crafted by placing a Cake in a crafting grid. They take half the normal time to eat and when consumed, they have a 75% chance to apply Regeneration 3 for 1 second.

**Splash Potions of Recovery** can be crafted with a glass bottle in the center of a crafting grid, Amethyst Shards in the corners, and Diamonds in all other slots. When thrown, they apply Regeneration V and Saturation for 1.5 seconds.  They have a 1-second cooldown.

**Invulnerium Ingots** can be crafted with a Diamond in the center of a crafting grid, Netherite Ingots in the corners, and Slimeballs in the remaining slots.  When applied to Netherite equipment in a Smithing Table with an Invulnerium Upgrade Smithing Template, they repair all damage to the item and make it Unbreakable.

**Invulnerium Upgrade Smithing Templates** can be crafted by surrounding a Netherite Upgrade with 8 Invulnerium Ingots (see above). Additionally, the can be duplicated the same way as other Smithing templates, but with Amethyst Shards instead of Diamonds and a Netherite Block as the block.
 
**Intricate Totems** can be crafted by placing a Totem of Undying in the center of a 3x3 crafting grid, putting an Emerald above it, and filling the rest of the slots with Gold Ingots.  They work similarly to Totems of Undying but apply better status effects (Regeneration III for 30 seconds, Absorption IV for 2 minutes, and Resistance for 30 seconds).

**Netherite Paxels** can be crafted with a Netherite Upgrade, 4 Netherite Ingots, and a Diamond Pickaxe, Diamond Axe, Diamond Shovel, and Diamond Hoe in the corners. They mine Pickaxe-mineable blocks, Axe-mineable blocks, Shovel-mineable blocks, and Hoe-mineable blocks.

**Prelit TNT** can be crafted with a Redstone Torch and a TNT. when placed, they are lit automatically and have a 1-second fuse.

**Negotiation Flasks** can be crafted with an Ominous Bottle surrounded by 8 Emerald Blocks.  When consumed, they apply Hero of the Village II for 2 minutes.

The **Gilded Music Disc** can be crafted with a Pigstep Music Disc in the center of the crafting grid, 4 Gold Ingots in the corners, and 4 Nether Bricks in the remaining slots.  The music was composed by @T_en_M.  You can find it on YouTube here.

**Glowberry Juice** can be crafted with a Glowberry and a Glass Bottle.  When consumed, it applies Glowing for 5 minutes and Night Vision for 5 minutes.

A **Crystal Spear** can be crafted with an Amethyst Shard and 2 Blaze Rods.  It has the stats of a Netherite Sword and has an extra block of reach.

## Enchantments:
**Mobility** can be applied to leggings and pants, with a maximum of 3 levels.  The first level grants +20% Speed and +20% Jump Strength, and each level after that grants +10% Speed and +10% Jump Strength.

**Extended Handle** can be applied to mining tools. It grants +1 Block Interaction Range.
